container_recipe_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the container recipe associated with the image pipeline.

date_created.description: The date when the image pipeline was created.

date_last_run.description: The date when the image pipeline was last run.

date_next_run.description: The date when the image pipeline is scheduled to run next.

date_updated.description: The date when the image pipeline was last updated.

description.description: A brief description of the image pipeline.

distribution_configuration_arn.description: The ARN of the distribution configuration associated with the image pipeline.

enhanced_image_metadata_enabled.description: Indicates if enhanced image metadata is enabled for the image pipeline.

id.description: The unique identifier of the image pipeline.

image_recipe_arn.description: The ARN of the image recipe associated with the image pipeline.

image_scanning_configuration.description: Configuration details for image scanning in the image pipeline.

image_tests_configuration.description: Configuration details for image tests, including whether tests are enabled and the timeout period.

infrastructure_configuration_arn.description: The ARN of the infrastructure configuration associated with the image pipeline.

name.description: The name of the image pipeline.

platform.description: The platform for which the image is created (e.g., Windows or Linux).

schedule.description: Details of the schedule on which the image pipeline runs, including start conditions and expressions.

status.description: The current status of the image pipeline.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the image pipeline.
